name: Media Planning & Buying
student_summary: Decide where advertising money goes — and prove it worked.
overview: Decide where advertising money goes — and prove it worked. Media Planning & Buying sits in the Strategy & Insights family of Communication, Marketing & Sales. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: Numbers and patterns make sense to you
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply media strategy to real problems
Collaborate with your team using budget allocation
Keep improving at negotiation — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
alternative_paths: Build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Strategy & Insights foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Routine tasks are being automated — you must keep moving up the value chain
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Media Planning & Buying is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of budget allocation
projects: Beginner: explore media strategy with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Planning tools
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Advertising & Brand Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Digital Marketing: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Market Research & Insights: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Media Planning & Buying pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹20 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Mathematics, Economics. Typical degrees: BBA/Mass Comm + agency training. Alternatives exist: build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Media Planning & Buying evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Media Planning & Buying is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
